generated_by: Static extraction from source (Next.js App Router, Turkish public site).

site_url_constant.brand_name_source: src/config/site.ts -> siteConfig.brandName (env NEXT_PUBLIC_BRAND_NAME, fallback 'Hasarlı Araç Alan')

metadataBase.note: Every page sets alternates.canonical and openGraph.url as ROOT-RELATIVE paths. Next.js resolves them to absolute URLs against metadataBase. So canonicals ARE derived from the SITE_URL constant. Two exceptions: /tesekkurler sets no canonical, and /arama + /tesekkurler are noindex.

title_template.default: Hasarlı Araç Alan — Hasarlı Araç Alımı
title_template.note: Each page's metaTitle_raw is a plain string and is rendered through this template EXCEPT the home page, which uses title.absolute to bypass it. title_rendered shows the final <title>.

global_meta_keywords: None. No page defines meta keywords anywhere in the codebase.
non_html_seo_routes: src/app/sitemap.ts (if present) / src/app/rss.xml / src/app/llms.txt — auxiliary SEO endpoints, not counted as pages.
